name: Lemon Butter Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Add lemon rind to butter and cream well.
2. Gradually add part of the sugar, blending after each addition.
3. Continue adding remaining sugar, alternating with lemon juice, until you achieve the desired consistency for spreading.
4. Beat thoroughly after each addition.
5. Add salt.
6. Makes enough frosting to cover tops and sides of two 9-inch layers or tops and sides of two 8x8x2-inch layers.
From the Kate Smith Collection, 1940. General Foods Corp. (Courtesy of Barb Day)
